ocr_findings.description: Ruby text 'ディエイチシービー' above DHCP appears as a standalone line in OCR rather than inline ruby; formatting issue only, content preserved
NAT diagram (グローバルIPアドレスとプライベートIPアドレス flow chart) represented as image placeholder; diagram labels not extracted

reviewer_notes: Page 478 of the source. NAT/DHCP explanation with network diagram. All body text reproduced accurately including DHCP full name expansion and ITパスポート exam tip sentence. Diagram content is image-only and not textually extractable.
